content_en:
Book of The End: Great Trials and Tribulations 733

related in Mutawaatir form (i.e, so many people related from so many people at each level of the narration, that it is impossible for them to have erred or to have colluded upon a lie). That Paradise and the Hellfire exist at the present time is a belief of Ahlus-Sunnah Wal-Jaman’ah, those who adhere to the firm rope. Therefore our view is contrary to those who claim that Paradise and the Hellfire are yet to be created — that they will be created on the Day of Resurrection. This view issues forth from those who have not come across Ahaadeeth that are authentic by the consensus of the scholars, Ahandeeth that are found in sahih Muslim, sahih Bukhaaree, and other trusted and famous Islamic sources; those Ahaadeeth are related with authentic and good chains which cannot be repudiated, for they are related by so many narrators at each level of those narrations that it is impossible for them to have colluded together in order to fabricate a lie.

It is established in sahih Bukhaaree and Sahech Muslim that the Messenger of Allah i saw paradise and the Hellfire during his night journey.

And the Messenger of Allah 2% said, “The Hellfire complained to its Lord, saying, ‘O my Lord, part of me has consumed another part of me/ and then Allah permitted it to take two breaths: one in the winter and one in the summer, and so the most bitter cold you find js from its cold, and the most severe heat you find is from its heat. So when it is hot, cool yourselves with the Prayer (ie., delay it in the afternoon until the temperature cools down).”

Abu Hurairah . related that the Messenger of Allah 2% said, “Paradise and the Hellfire debated. The Hellfire said, ‘I have been favored with the arrogant and oppressive ones.’ Paradise said, ‘Why is it that only the weak ones from the people and their lower ones enter me, to the exclusion of others?’ Allah said to Paradise, ‘You are My Mercy; I have Mercy through you upon whomsoever I please from My slaves.’ And He ¥% said to the Hellfire, “You are My Punishment: with you I punish whomsoever I please from My slaves. Each one of you has his fill’ As for the Hellfire, it will not become filled until He 4# places His Foot on it, saying, ‘Enough, enough’ Then will it become filled, as it withdraws into itself. And Allah does not wrong anyone from His creation. As for Paradise, Allah will create some created beings for it (and thus it becomes filled).” Related by Bukhaaree and Muslim, and this wording is of

734 Book of The End: Great Trials and Tribulations

the narration of Muslim.

Anas 2 reported that the Messenger of Allah # said, “Hellfire will continue to have (its dwellers) thrown into it, and it will say, ‘Are there any more?’ Until the All-Mighty places His Foot in it, and it withdraws into itself, It will say, ‘Enough, enough, by Your Glory and Generosity. And there will continue to be extra space in Paradise until Allah creates some created beings for it, and makes them inhabit that extra space in Paradise.” (Bukhaaree and Muslim) However, what is mentioned above is contrary to what Abu Hurairah # related from the Prophet # in a hadith found in sahih Al-Bukhaaree. In it, it is mentioned that Allah # creates for the Hellfire whomsoever He 4 pleases, and then they are thrown into it. Then it will say, “Axe there any more.” Some of the trusted retainers of Ahaadeeth have said, “This is a mistake on the part of some narrator; perhaps he became confused and mixed up the words, transferring the ruling for Paradise to the Hellfire.” And Allah knows best.

If we suppose the above narration in Bukhaaree to be correctly memorized, it might mean that Allah 8¢ will test those people in Al- ‘Arasaat (vast planes of the Day of Judgment) just as He will test others upon whom the proof was not established in the world. As for those who disobey from them, He will admit them into the Hellfire; and as for those who answer from them, He will admit them into Paradise, and that is because of the saying of Allah #: + oe wes OL “And We never punish until We have sent a Messenger (to give warningy’"

And the saying of Allah 3:

ox Bey ct ge ty che ae wae eek Sad we ae al GE oth OS 3 S345 Gs IGP

CCS he ail 5 Je

“Messengers are bearers of good news as well as of warning in order that mankind should have no plea against Allah % after the (coming

Book of The End: Great Trials and Tribulations 735

of) Messengers. And Allah # is Ever All-Powerful, All-Wise.”"

Some Attributes Of The People Of Paradise And Some Attributes Of The People Of The Hellfire

We have previously mentioned the description of the people of Paradise at the time when they will approach it and enter it. Their form will become 60 arm-spans in length and 7 arm-spans in width. They will have no hair on their bodies, they will be Mukahhaleen (blackness in their eyelids as a part of their form and appearance, and not through the use of kohl}, and they will each be 33 years old. Anas ibn Maalik 2 reported that the Messenger of Allah #8 said, “The people of Paradise will enter Paradise upon the height of Adam: sixty arm-spans upon the beauty of Yousuf, upon the birth of ‘Resa — thirty three years (old), and upon the tongue of Muhammad.” (Related by Abu Bakr ibn Abee Ad-Dunyaa)}

In a narration related by Daawood ibn Al-Husain, Ibn ‘Abbaas 2 said, “The tongue of the dwellers of Paradise is Arabic.”

In another narration, Abu Kareemah Al-Miqdaam Ibn Ma’dee-Karib related that the Messenger of Allah #¢ said, “There is no person who dies Saqatan (i.e. in a miscarriage) or old age or between those two except that he will be raised upon the age of thirty — and in another narration, thirty three. If he is from the dwellers of Paradise, he will be upon the...appearance of Yousuf and the heart of Ayyoob. He will be Murdan (no hair on his chin; this refers to his beauty) and Mukahhil (blackness in his eyelids as a part of his form and appearance, and not through the use of kohl). And whoever is from the people of the Hellfire will be made large and huge like the mountains.” In one narration, “Until the skin on one of their hands becomes 40 arm-spans (thick) and until a canine tooth from their canine teeth becomes like Uhud (a famous mountain in Madeenah).” Al-Baihagee related the above through two chains,

736 Book of The End: Great Trials and Tribulations

both of which have weakness in them.

And it is established, that the people of Paradise eat and drink, though they do not urinate or defecate. Their food leaves them through their sweat, which will have a fragrance like musk AlAdhfar, And their breaths will be Tahmeed (i.c. saying, ‘Alhamdulillah’ all praise is for Allah), Takbeer (i.e. saying, ‘Allahuakbar, allah is the greatest), and Tasbeeh (ie. saying, “Subhaanallah,’ how perfect Allah is!).

And it also established that the first group from them will be upon the appearance of the moon; then those who follow them will be in splendor, upon the light of (the most) glistening star in the sky. They will have sexual intercourse, though they will not reproduce or have children unless they want to. And they will never die or sleep. That they do not sleep indicates the completeness of their life and the abundance of their pleasures - such as being served food and drink continuously. The more they advance in their eternal lives, the more they will increase in their beauty, splendor, youth, strength, and completion, And Paradise will increase for them in its beauty, splendor, fragrance, goodness, and light. And they will come to desire it ever more as it increases in honor, delight, and sweetness, Allah @ said: fone her ee ee “Wherein they shall dwell (forever). No desire will they have for removal therefrom.""")

We have already mentioned that the very first person to enter Paradise from the children of Adam is the Messenger of Allah 2%, and he will be the highest of them in degree. And among the nations, his will be the first to enter Paradise. The first to enter Paradise from this nation is Abu Bakr As-Siddeeq 4. We also pointed out that the individuals of this nation are going to represent

Book of The End : Great Trials and Tribulations 737

a large portion of the dwellers of Paradise: they will represent twothirds of its dwellers. We have previously mentioned that, “The people of Paradise will be in 120 rows; this nation will make up 80 of those rows.”

The Poor Ones From This nation Will Enter Paradise 500 Years Before The Rich Ones From It

Abu Hurairah 4: ascribed the following saying to the Prophet #8: “The poor Muslims will enter Paradise half a day before the rich ones from them, and that is (equal to) 500 years.” (Al-Musnad, Jaamai’ At-Tirmidhee, and Sunan Ibn Maajah) The chain of this narration fulfills the conditions of Muslim. And At-Tirmidhee said, “Hasan sahih.”

At-Tabaraanee related a similar Marfoo’ narration (one that is ascribed to the Prophet #%) from Abu Hurairah .

If the first narration is correctly memorized, then it is referring to the first of the poor ones and the last of the rich ones. And Allah knows best.

The First Three To Enter Paradise And The First Three To Enter The Hellfire

Abu Hurairah # related that the Messenger of Allah #% said, “The first three to enter Paradise and the first three to enter the Hellfire ‘were presented to me. As for the first three to enter Paradise, they are the martyr, the owned slave who is not occupied away from obedience to his Lord by the slavery of the world, and the poor one who is Muta‘affif (who abstains from the unlawful and from asking others), and who has dependents. As for the first three to enter the Hellfire, they are the ruler who is Musallit (Le. who is given authority and becomes oppressive), one who is possessed of great wealth but does not fulfill the right of Allah in his wealth, and the poor person who is proud (boastful).” (Ahmad) At-Tirmidhee related it through a different chain and said, “Hasan.” But he didn’t mention
content_id:
Kitab Akhir Zaman: Fitnah dan Tribulasi Besar 733

diriwayatkan dalam bentuk Mutawatir (yaitu, begitu banyak orang yang meriwayatkan dari begitu banyak orang di setiap tingkat riwayat, sehingga mustahil bagi mereka untuk telah melakukan kesalahan atau berkolusi dalam kebohongan). Bahwa Surga dan Neraka ada pada saat ini adalah keyakinan Ahlus-Sunnah Wal-Jama'ah, mereka yang berpegang teguh pada tali yang kokoh. Oleh karena itu pandangan kami berbeda dengan mereka yang mengklaim bahwa Surga dan Neraka belum diciptakan — bahwa keduanya akan diciptakan pada Hari Kebangkitan. Pandangan ini muncul dari mereka yang belum menemukan hadis-hadis yang autentik berdasarkan kesepakatan para ulama, hadis-hadis yang terdapat dalam sahih Muslim, sahih Al-Bukhari, dan sumber-sumber Islam lainnya yang terpercaya dan terkenal; hadis-hadis tersebut diriwayatkan dengan sanad-sanad yang autentik dan baik yang tidak dapat dibantah, karena diriwayatkan oleh begitu banyak perawi di setiap tingkat riwayat sehingga mustahil bagi mereka untuk berkolusi untuk membuat kebohongan.

Telah ditetapkan dalam sahih Al-Bukhari dan Sahih Muslim bahwa Rasulullah melihat Surga dan Neraka dalam perjalanan malam-Nya.

Dan Rasulullah bersabda, 'Neraka mengadu kepada Tuhannya, berkata, 'Wahai Tuhanku, sebagian dariku telah memakan bagian lainnya,' kemudian Allah mengizinkannya untuk mengambil dua napas: satu di musim dingin dan satu di musim panas, maka dingin yang paling menggigit yang kamu rasakan berasal dari dinginnya, dan panas yang paling menyengat yang kamu rasakan berasal dari panasnya. Maka ketika udara panas, dinginkanlah dirimu dengan Salat (yaitu, tundakanlah ia di sore hari hingga suhu mendingin).'

Abu Hurairah (ra) meriwayatkan bahwa Rasulullah bersabda, 'Surga dan Neraka berdebat. Neraka berkata, 'Aku dimuliakan dengan orang-orang yang sombong dan zalim.' Surga berkata, 'Mengapa hanya orang-orang yang lemah dari manusia dan yang rendah di antara mereka yang masuk ke dalamku, sementara yang lainnya tidak?' Allah berkata kepada Surga, 'Engkau adalah Rahmat-Ku; melaluimu Aku merahmati siapapun yang Aku kehendaki dari hamba-hamba-Ku.' Dan Dia berkata kepada Neraka, 'Engkau adalah Azab-Ku; denganmu Aku mengazab siapapun yang Aku kehendaki dari hamba-hamba-Ku. Masing-masing dari kamu memiliki pengisian.' Adapun Neraka, ia tidak akan penuh hingga Dia menempatkan Kaki-Nya ke dalamnya, sambil berkata, 'Cukup, cukup.' Kemudian barulah ia penuh, sambil menyusut pada dirinya sendiri. Dan Allah tidak menzalimi siapapun dari ciptaan-Nya. Adapun Surga, Allah akan menciptakan beberapa makhluk ciptaan untuknya (dan dengan demikian ia menjadi penuh).' Diriwayatkan oleh Bukhari dan Muslim, dan lafaz ini dari riwayat Muslim.

734 Kitab Akhir Zaman: Fitnah dan Tribulasi Besar

Anas (ra) melaporkan bahwa Rasulullah bersabda, 'Neraka akan terus memiliki (penghuninya) yang dilemparkan ke dalamnya, dan ia akan berkata, 'Apakah ada lagi?' Hingga Yang Maha Mulia menempatkan Kaki-Nya ke dalamnya, dan ia menyusut pada dirinya sendiri. Ia akan berkata, 'Cukup, cukup, demi Kemuliaan dan Kemurahan-Mu.' Dan akan terus ada ruang yang tersisa di Surga hingga Allah menciptakan beberapa makhluk ciptaan untuknya, dan membuat mereka menghuni ruang yang tersisa itu di Surga.' (Bukhari dan Muslim) Namun, apa yang disebutkan di atas bertentangan dengan apa yang Abu Hurairah (ra) riwayatkan dari Nabi dalam sebuah hadis yang terdapat dalam sahih Al-Bukhari. Di dalamnya disebutkan bahwa Allah menciptakan untuk Neraka siapapun yang Dia kehendaki, kemudian mereka dilemparkan ke dalamnya. Kemudian ia akan berkata, 'Apakah ada lagi?' Sebagian dari para penghafal hadis yang terpercaya telah berkata, 'Ini adalah kesalahan dari sebagian perawi; mungkin ia bingung dan mencampuradukkan kata-kata, mengalihkan hukum untuk Surga ke Neraka.' Dan Allah yang lebih mengetahui.

Jika kita menganggap riwayat di atas dalam Bukhari sebagai yang terjaga dengan baik, mungkin maknanya adalah Allah akan menguji orang-orang tersebut di Al-'Arasat (hamparan luas pada Hari Penghakiman) sebagaimana Dia akan menguji orang-orang lain yang belum ditegakkan hujah kepada mereka di dunia. Adapun mereka yang mendurhakai dari antara mereka, Dia akan memasukkan mereka ke dalam Neraka; dan adapun mereka yang menjawab dari antara mereka, Dia akan memasukkan mereka ke dalam Surga, dan itu karena firman Allah: 'Dan Kami tidak pernah mengazab hingga Kami mengutus seorang Rasul (untuk memberikan peringatan).'

Dan firman Allah:

'Para Rasul membawa kabar gembira sekaligus peringatan agar manusia tidak memiliki hujah untuk melawan Allah setelah (datangnya)

Kitab Akhir Zaman: Fitnah dan Tribulasi Besar 735

para Rasul. Dan Allah Maha Kuasa, Maha Bijaksana.'

Beberapa Sifat Penghuni Surga dan Beberapa Sifat Penghuni Neraka

Kami telah menyebutkan sebelumnya gambaran penghuni Surga pada saat mereka akan mendekatinya dan memasukinya. Bentuk mereka akan menjadi 60 hasta dalam panjang dan 7 hasta dalam lebar. Mereka tidak memiliki rambut di tubuh mereka, mereka akan Mukahhalin (kehitaman di kelopak mata mereka sebagai bagian dari bentuk dan penampilan mereka, bukan melalui penggunaan celak), dan masing-masing berusia 33 tahun. Anas ibn Malik (ra) melaporkan bahwa Rasulullah bersabda, 'Penghuni Surga akan masuk ke Surga dengan ketinggian Adam: enam puluh hasta, dengan keindahan Yusuf, dengan usia 'Isa — tiga puluh tiga tahun, dan dengan lisan Muhammad.' (Diriwayatkan oleh Abu Bakr ibn Abi Ad-Dunya)

Dalam riwayat yang diriwayatkan oleh Dawud ibn Al-Husain, Ibn 'Abbas (ra) berkata, 'Lisan penghuni Surga adalah bahasa Arab.'

Dalam riwayat lain, Abu Karimah Al-Miqdam ibn Ma'di-Karib meriwayatkan bahwa Rasulullah bersabda, 'Tidak ada seorang pun yang meninggal Saqatan (yaitu, dalam keguguran) atau tua atau di antara keduanya kecuali ia akan dibangkitkan pada usia tiga puluh — dan dalam riwayat lain, tiga puluh tiga. Jika ia termasuk penghuni Surga, ia akan berada dalam... penampilan Yusuf dan hati Ayyub. Ia akan Murdan (tidak ada rambut di dagunya; ini merujuk pada kecantikannya) dan Mukahhil (kehitaman di kelopak matanya sebagai bagian dari bentuk dan penampilannya, bukan melalui penggunaan celak). Dan barangsiapa yang termasuk penghuni Neraka akan dibuat besar dan besar seperti gunung-gunung.' Dalam satu riwayat, 'Hingga kulit di salah satu tangan mereka menjadi 40 hasta (tebalnya) dan hingga gigi taring dari gigi taring mereka menjadi seperti Uhud (gunung terkenal di Madinah).' Al-Baihaqi meriwayatkan hal di atas melalui dua sanad,

736 Kitab Akhir Zaman: Fitnah dan Tribulasi Besar

yang keduanya memiliki kelemahan di dalamnya.

Dan telah ditetapkan bahwa penghuni Surga makan dan minum, meskipun mereka tidak buang air kecil maupun buang air besar. Makanan mereka keluar melalui keringat mereka, yang akan memiliki semerbak wangi seperti misk Al-Adzfar. Dan napas-napas mereka akan berupa Tahmid (yaitu, mengucapkan, 'Alhamdulillah,' segala puji bagi Allah), Takbir (yaitu, mengucapkan, 'Allahuakbar,' Allah Maha Besar), dan Tasbih (yaitu, mengucapkan, 'Subhanallah,' Maha Suci Allah!).

Dan telah ditetapkan pula bahwa kelompok pertama dari mereka akan berada dalam penampilan bulan; kemudian mereka yang menyusul akan bersinar, dalam cahaya bintang yang paling cemerlang di langit. Mereka akan berhubungan seksual, meskipun mereka tidak akan bereproduksi atau memiliki anak-anak kecuali mereka menginginkannya. Dan mereka tidak akan pernah mati atau tidur. Bahwa mereka tidak tidur menunjukkan kesempurnaan kehidupan mereka dan kelimpahan kenikmatan-kenikmatan mereka — seperti terus-menerus disajikan makanan dan minuman. Semakin mereka berkembang dalam kehidupan abadi mereka, semakin mereka akan bertambah dalam keindahan, kemegahan, kemudaan, kekuatan, dan kesempurnaan mereka. Dan Surga akan bertambah bagi mereka dalam keindahan, kemegahan, wewangian, kebaikan, dan cahayanya. Dan mereka akan semakin menginginkannya seiring ia bertambah dalam kehormatan, kesenangan, dan kemanisannya. Allah berfirman: 'Mereka kekal di dalamnya. Mereka tidak ingin berpindah daripadanya.'

Kami telah menyebutkan bahwa orang pertama yang masuk Surga dari anak-anak Adam adalah Rasulullah, dan beliau akan menjadi yang tertinggi derajatnya di antara mereka. Dan di antara bangsa-bangsa, umatnya yang pertama akan masuk Surga. Yang pertama masuk Surga dari umat ini adalah Abu Bakr As-Shiddiq (ra). Kami juga menunjukkan bahwa individu-individu dari umat ini akan mewakili

Kitab Akhir Zaman: Fitnah dan Tribulasi Besar 737

sebagian besar penghuni Surga: mereka akan mewakili dua pertiga dari penghuninya. Kami telah menyebutkan sebelumnya bahwa, 'Penghuni Surga akan berada dalam 120 barisan; umat ini akan membentuk 80 dari barisan-barisan tersebut.'

Orang-Orang Miskin dari Umat Ini Akan Masuk Surga 500 Tahun Sebelum Orang-Orang Kaya dari Umat Ini

Abu Hurairah (ra) menisbahkan sabda berikut kepada Nabi: 'Orang-orang Muslim yang miskin akan masuk Surga setengah hari sebelum orang-orang yang kaya dari mereka, dan itu (sama dengan) 500 tahun.' (Al-Musnad, Jami' At-Tirmidzi, dan Sunan Ibn Majah) Sanad riwayat ini memenuhi syarat-syarat Muslim. Dan At-Tirmidzi berkata, 'Hasan sahih.'

At-Thabarani meriwayatkan riwayat Marfu' (yang dinisbahkan kepada Nabi) yang serupa dari Abu Hurairah (ra).

Jika riwayat pertama terjaga dengan baik, maka itu merujuk pada yang pertama dari orang-orang miskin dan yang terakhir dari orang-orang kaya. Dan Allah yang lebih mengetahui.

Tiga Orang Pertama yang Masuk Surga dan Tiga Orang Pertama yang Masuk Neraka

Abu Hurairah (ra) meriwayatkan bahwa Rasulullah bersabda, 'Tiga orang pertama yang masuk Surga dan tiga orang pertama yang masuk Neraka diperlihatkan kepadaku. Adapun tiga orang pertama yang masuk Surga, mereka adalah syahid, hamba yang dimiliki yang tidak disibukkan dari ketaatan kepada Tuhannya oleh perbudakan dunia, dan orang miskin yang Muta'affif (yang menahan diri dari yang haram dan dari meminta kepada orang lain), dan yang memiliki tanggungan. Adapun tiga orang pertama yang masuk Neraka, mereka adalah penguasa yang Musallit (yaitu yang diberi kekuasaan dan menjadi zalim), orang yang memiliki kekayaan besar namun tidak memenuhi hak Allah dalam hartanya, dan orang miskin yang sombong (membanggakan diri).' (Ahmad) At-Tirmidzi meriwayatkannya melalui sanad yang berbeda dan berkata, 'Hasan.' Namun ia tidak menyebutkan
content_ar: الكتاب of The End: Great الابتلاءات and Tribulations 733 related in Mutawaatir form (i.e, لذا many people related from لذا many people at each level of the narration, that it is impossible for them to have erred or to have colluded upon a lie). That الجنة and the النار exist at the present time is a الاعتقاد of Ahlus-السنة Wal-Jaman’ah, those who adhere to the firm rope. لذلك our view is contrary to those who claim that الجنة and the النار are yet to be created — that they will be created on the Day of البعث. This view issues forth from those who have not come across Ahaadeeth that are authentic by the consensus of the العلماء, Ahandeeth that are found in صحيح مسلم, صحيح Bukhaaree, and other trusted and famous Islamic sources; those Ahaadeeth are related with authentic and الخير chains which cannot be repudiated, for they are related by لذا many narrators at each level of those narrations that it is impossible for them to have colluded together من أجل fabricate a lie. ثبت in صحيح Bukhaaree and Sahech مسلم that الرسول ﷺ of الله i saw الجنة and the النار خلال his night journey. And الرسول ﷺ of الله 2% said, “The النار complained to its Lord, saying, ‘O my Lord, part of me has consumed another part of me/ and then الله permitted it to take two breaths: one in the winter and one in the summer, and لذا the most bitter cold you find js from its cold, and the most severe heat you find is from its heat. لذا عندما it is hot, cool yourselves with the الصلاة (ie., delay it in the afternoon حتى the temperature cools down).” أبو هريرة . related that الرسول ﷺ of الله 2% said, “الجنة and the النار debated. The النار said, ‘I have been favored with the arrogant and oppressive ones.’ الجنة said, ‘Why is it that only the weak ones from the people and their lower ones enter me, to the exclusion of others?’ الله said to الجنة, ‘You are My الرحمة; I have الرحمة through you upon whomsoever I please from My slaves.’ And He ¥% said to the النار, “You are My العقاب: with you I punish whomsoever I please from My slaves. Each one of you has his fill’ أما the النار, it will not become filled حتى He 4# places His Foot on it, saying, ‘Enough, enough’ Then will it become filled, as it withdraws into itself. And الله does not الخطأ anyone from His creation. أما الجنة, الله will create some created beings for it (and وهكذا it becomes filled).” Related by Bukhaaree and مسلم, and this wording is of 734 الكتاب of The End: Great الابتلاءات and Tribulations the narration of مسلم. أنس 2 reported that الرسول ﷺ of الله # said, “النار will continue to have (its dwellers) thrown into it, and it will say, ‘Are there any more?’ حتى the All-Mighty places His Foot in it, and it withdraws into itself, It will say, ‘Enough, enough, by Your Glory and الكرم. And there will continue to be extra space in الجنة حتى الله creates some created beings for it, and makes them inhabit that extra space in الجنة.” (Bukhaaree and مسلم) غير أن, what is mentioned above is contrary to what أبو هريرة # related from النبي ﷺ # in a الحديث found in صحيح البخاري. In it, ورد that الله # creates for the النار whomsoever He 4 pleases, and then they are thrown into it. Then it will say, “Axe there any more.” Some of the trusted retainers of Ahaadeeth have said, “This is a mistake on the part of some narrator; perhaps he became confused and mixed up the words, transferring the ruling for الجنة to the النار.” And الله knows best. إذا we suppose the above narration in Bukhaaree to be correctly memorized, it might mean that الله 8¢ will الاختبار those people in Al- ‘Arasaat (vast planes of the يوم القيامة) just as He will الاختبار others upon whom the proof was not established in the الدنيا. أما those who disobey from them, He will admit them into the النار; and أما those who answer from them, He will admit them into الجنة, and that is لأن of the saying of الله #: + oe wes OL “And We never punish حتى We have sent a Messenger (to give warningy’" And the saying of الله 3: ox Bey ct ge ty che ae wae eek Sad we ae al GE oth OS 3 S345 Gs IGP CCS he ail 5 Je “الرسل are bearers of الخير news as well as of warning in order that mankind should have no plea against الله % بعد the (coming الكتاب of The End: Great الابتلاءات and Tribulations 735 of) الرسل. And الله # is Ever All-Powerful, All-Wise.”" Some Attributes Of The People Of الجنة And Some Attributes Of The People Of The النار We have previously mentioned the description of the people of الجنة at the time عندما they will approach it and enter it. Their form will become 60 arm-spans in length and 7 arm-spans in width. They will have no hair on their bodies, they will be Mukahhaleen (blackness in their eyelids as a part of their form and appearance, and not through the use of kohl}, and they will each be 33 years old. أنس ibn Maalik 2 reported that الرسول ﷺ of الله #8 said, “The people of الجنة will enter الجنة upon the height of آدم: sixty arm-spans upon the beauty of Yousuf, upon the birth of ‘Resa — thirty three years (old), and upon the tongue of محمد ﷺ.” (Related by أبو بكر ibn Abee Ad-Dunyaa)} In a narration related by Daawood ibn Al-Husain, Ibn ‘Abbaas 2 said, “The tongue of the dwellers of الجنة is Arabic.” In another narration, Abu Kareemah Al-Miqdaam Ibn Ma’dee-Karib related that الرسول ﷺ of الله #¢ said, “There is no person who dies Saqatan (i.e. in a miscarriage) or old age or between those two except that he will be raised upon the age of thirty — and in another narration, thirty three. إذا he is from the dwellers of الجنة, he will be upon the...appearance of Yousuf and the القلب of Ayyoob. He will be Murdan (no hair on his chin; this refers to his beauty) and Mukahhil (blackness in his eyelids as a part of his form and appearance, and not through the use of kohl). And whoever is from the people of the النار will be made large and huge like the mountains.” In one narration, “حتى the skin on one of their hands becomes 40 arm-spans (thick) and حتى a canine tooth from their canine teeth becomes like Uhud (a famous mountain in Madeenah).” Al-Baihagee related the above through two chains, 736 الكتاب of The End: Great الابتلاءات and Tribulations both of which have الضعف in them. And ثبت, that the people of الجنة eat and drink, though they do not urinate or defecate. Their food leaves them through their sweat, which will have a fragrance like musk AlAdhfar, And their breaths will be Tahmeed (i.c. saying, ‘الحمد لله’ all praise is for الله), Takbeer (i.e. saying, ‘Allahuakbar, الله is the greatest), and Tasbeeh (ie. saying, “Subhaanallah,’ how perfect الله is!). And it أيضاً established that the أولاً group from them will be upon the appearance of the moon; then those who follow them will be in splendor, upon the light of (the most) glistening star in the sky. They will have sexual intercourse, though they will not reproduce or have الأولاد إلا إذا they want to. And they will never die or sleep. That they do not sleep indicates the completeness of their الحياة and the abundance of their pleasures - مثل being served food and drink continuously. The more they advance in their eternal lives, the more they will increase in their beauty, splendor, youth, القوة, and completion, And الجنة will increase for them in its beauty, splendor, fragrance, goodness, and light. And they will come to desire it ever more as it increases in الشرف, delight, and sweetness, الله @ said: fone her ee ee “Wherein they shall dwell (forever). No desire will they have for removal therefrom.""") We have already mentioned that the very أولاً person to enter الجنة from the الأولاد of آدم is الرسول ﷺ of الله 2%, and he will be the highest of them in degree. And among the nations, his will be the أولاً to enter الجنة. The أولاً to enter الجنة from this nation is أبو بكر As-Siddeeq 4. We أيضاً pointed out that the individuals of this nation are going to represent الكتاب of The End : Great الابتلاءات and Tribulations 737 a large portion of the dwellers of الجنة: they will represent twothirds of its dwellers. We have previously mentioned that, “The people of الجنة will be in 120 rows; this nation will make up 80 of those rows.” The Poor Ones From This nation Will Enter الجنة 500 Years قبل The Rich Ones From It أبو هريرة 4: ascribed the following saying to النبي ﷺ #8: “The poor المسلمون will enter الجنة half a day قبل the rich ones from them, and that is (equal to) 500 years.” (Al-Musnad, Jaamai’ At-Tirmidhee, and Sunan Ibn Maajah) The chain of this narration fulfills the conditions of مسلم. And At-Tirmidhee said, “حسن صحيح.” At-Tabaraanee related a similar Marfoo’ narration (one that is ascribed to النبي ﷺ #%) from أبو هريرة . إذا the أولاً narration is correctly memorized, then it is referring to the أولاً of the poor ones and the last of the rich ones. And الله knows best. The أولاً Three To Enter الجنة And The أولاً Three To Enter The النار أبو هريرة # related that الرسول ﷺ of الله #% said, “The أولاً three to enter الجنة and the أولاً three to enter the النار ‘were presented to me. أما the أولاً three to enter الجنة, they are the martyr, the owned slave who is not occupied away from obedience to his Lord by the slavery of the الدنيا, and the poor one who is Muta‘affif (who abstains from the unlawful and from asking others), and who has dependents. أما the أولاً three to enter the النار, they are the ruler who is Musallit (Le. who is given authority and becomes oppressive), one who is possessed of great الثروة but does not fulfill the الحق of الله in his الثروة, and the poor person who is proud (boastful).” (أحمد) At-Tirmidhee related it through a different chain and said, “حسن.” But he didn’t mention
